title: Validate maia-kmod crash fix on nano hardware

facts.text: CI builds nano firmware successfully with the 0003 patch applied.
Firmware deploys via MSD: pluto.frm copied to MSD volume on macOS host, volume ejected. Device becomes accessible over serial after reboot.
5 consecutive reboots complete without free_pgtables panic or kernel oops in dmesg.
Device runs normally (SSH reachable, IIO context serves, no kernel splats) for at least 90 minutes after boot.
Recording device node (/dev/maia-sdr-recording) opens, mmaps, and munmaps without crash or kernel warning.
Rxbuffer device node (/dev/maia-sdr-rxbuffer) opens, mmaps, cacheinv ioctl returns success, munmaps cleanly.
